name: English
topics: Film Theory and Semiotics of the Image
target_style:
Expected style:
- Neutral, measured journalistic tone, neither too casual nor too academic
- Short sentences, oral rhythm but without exclamations or prompts like "Listen up!"
- Avoid excessive use of "you guys"; prefer "we" or impersonal forms
- Always end on a complete sentence, never mid-thought
- Prioritize facts, technical mechanisms, and industry examples over general opinions

fallback.conclusion: That concludes our podcast about {topic}. Thank you for listening.

prompts.system_data:
Here is some context for the prompts: 
{context}
prompts.topic_generation:
Seed: {seed}

Generate 3 titles for a technical podcast episode in English.
Topic: {topic}

ABSOLUTE RULES:
- Each title must be FACTUAL and grounded in the given topic
- No invention, no off-topic content
- One title per line, only between tags
- No numbering, no markdown, no parentheses

MANDATORY FORMAT (exactly like this):
[T]Title here[/T]
[T]Title here[/T]
[T]Title here[/T]
[T]Title here[/T]
[T]Title here[/T]
prompts.topic_choice:
You must choose the single most relevant and realistic title for a technical podcast in English.
Titles:
{topics}

Rules:
- Reply with ONLY the chosen title.
- If none are suitable, reply with exactly: [REGENERATE]
prompts.outline_generation:
Create a plan for a technical podcast episode in English.
Precise topic: {topic}

ABSOLUTE RULES:
- 4 to 6 DISTINCT sections, no overlap
- Each section must cover a DIFFERENT aspect of the topic
- Short titles (5 words max)
- No markdown, no explanations

MANDATORY FORMAT:
[P]Title[/P]
[P]Title[/P]
prompts.resume_section:
Extract the different points given in the following text in a few words and don't write anything else: 

{text}
prompts.already_covered_label: Topics already covered (DO NOT REPEAT THIS CONTENT):
prompts.intro_generation:
You are a radio journalist.
Write the introduction for a podcast about: {topic}
The podcast will cover: {outline_str}
{style}

Rules:
- 50 to 100 words
- Strong hook from the very first sentence
- Don't give a name to the podcast
- Clear outline of the plan without detailing it
- No staging (music, etc.)
- End with a complete sentence before [/I]

Format:
[I]
Text
[/I]
prompts.conclusion_generation:
You are a radio journalist.
Write the conclusion for a podcast about: {topic}
Points covered: {key_points}
{style}

Rules:
- 50 to 100 words
- Quick summary + opening toward the future
- No word-for-word repetition of sections
- End with a complete sentence before [/C]

Format:
[C]
Text
[/C]

log_messages.no_tty: No interactive terminal detected, defaulting to English.
log_messages.unsupported_lang: Unsupported language '{lang}', falling back to English.
